max_entry_age.source_quote: (a) MAXIMUM ENTRY AGE: Maximum Entry age for any member, is 65years.

grace_period.source_quote: At the end of the policy period, the policy shall terminate and can be renewed within the Grace Period of 30 days to maintain continuity of benefits without break in policy.

free_look_period.source_quote: The insured person shall be allowed free look period of 15 days from the date of receipt of the Policy document to review the terms and conditions of the Policy, and to return the same if not a

initial_waiting_period_days.source_quote: 4.3 30 day waiting period- code – ExcI03 a. Expenses related to the treatment of any illness within 30 days from the first policy commencement date shall be excluded except claims arising due to an accident, provided the same are covered.

pre_existing_disease_waiting_months.source_quote: D) and its direct complications shall be excluded until the expiry of 48 months of continuous coverage after the date of inception of the first policy with the insurer.

specific_disease_waiting_months.source_quote: Specific waiting periods: 1. 90 days for named diseases 2. 12 months for named diseases(clauses 4.3 (i & ii)) 3. 24 months for disease at (clauses 4.3 (iii to xxii)) 4. 48 months for diseases (clauses 4.3 (xxiii & xxiv)

pre_hospitalization_days.source_quote: PRE-HOSPITALISATION MEDICALEXPENSES means medical expenses incurred during the period up to 30 days prior to the date of admission in the Hospital, provided that:

post_hospitalization_days.source_quote: POST-HOSPITALISATION EXPENSES means medical expenses incurred for a period up to 60 days from the date of discharge from the Hospital, provided that:

day_care_treatments_count.source_note: Per insurer baseline (Oriental Insurance health plans cover 140+ day care treatments)

network_hospital_count.source_note: Oriental Insurance: 4,300+ network hospitals via GIPSA PPN (Coverfox aggregator; insurer site timed out). Alternate aggregator counts range 4,000-5,116 across the four PSU general insurers (GIPSA shared network). Scraped 2026-05-15.

co_payment_pct.source_quote: VOLUNTARY CO-PAYMENT: (OPTIONAL) i. If the insured opts for a Co-payment of 10% or 20%, he is eligible for a corresponding premium discount of 10% and 20% respectively.

room_rent_capped_at_pct_of_si.source_quote: i. Room, Boarding and Nursing Expenses as provided by the Hospital /Nursing Home. Not exceeding 1 % of the Sum Insured per day ii. Intensive Care Unit (ICU) Expenses as provided by the Hospital /Nursing Home.* Not exceeding 2% of the Sum Insured per day.

worldwide_emergency_cover.source_quote: Treatment taken outside the geographical limits of India. 4.39 Treatments such as Rotational Field Quantum Magnetic Resonance (RFQMR), External Counter Pulsation (ECP), Enhanced External Counter Pulsation (EECP), Hyperbaric Oxygen Therapy.

preventive_health_checkup.source_quote: The Insured shall be entitled for reimbursement of cost of Health checkup undertaken once at the expiry of a block of every THREE continuous underwriting years provided there are no claims reported during the block.
